name: Lost Celtor
description: A once great kingdom ruling over the Southern Luminant, now reduced to a scrambled mess of soldiers patrolling the City of the Drowned, their former capital, which was sunk during the Great Drowning.

name: The Children of Navae
description: A mainly nomadic tribe mostly containing Gremor who worship and are guided by Navae. Little is known besides that they originate from the Southern Luminant, much of which was lost in a great drowning.

name: The Knives of Eylis
description: Also known as the Silver Whalers, they are an organization of ruthless mercenaries. They are hired by the Central Authority to cause carnage in the East Luminant, raiding Etrean naval vessels.

name: The Divers
description: A faction based in the Central Luminant on the Island of Markor. They are a subdivision of the Citadel of Markor and focus on traversing and researching the Depths. Their goal is to better understand the Depths, combat its expansion, and protect the surface from creatures of the Deep.

name: The Summer Company
description: A mercantile company operating from the Summer Isle in the Aratel Sea. They are the overworld's chief supplier and manufacturer of firearms and ammunition, and they sell guns to the Authority.
goals: Profit, no matter who's the customer.

name: The Ministry
description: A group of mysterious Shadowcast users who seek to cause Great Drownings in order to achieve godhood. They are led by the Nine Prophets and have hostility toward the Children of Navae.

name: The Ignition Union
description: A faction active throughout the Eastern Luminant and the Depths. They are a renowned freelancer company and labor union specializing in trade, technology, R&D, and Depths exploration. They are contracted by the Central Authority to kill anything that crawls out of the Depths.

name: Etrea
description: A kingdom of primarily Etreans and the main ruling faction in the Eastern Luminant. They reside in their capital of Etris and also oversee the Isle of Vigils, which acts as a military school.

name: The Central Authority
description: A large military organization native to the Central Luminant. It is militaristic, authoritarian, expansionist, treacherous, and dishonorable. It works with smaller factions such as the Ignition Union, Summer Company, Divers, and Knives of Eylis.

name: The Hundred Legions
description: A superpower native to the Western Luminant. A powerful empire with a hundred legions of soldiers. They once allied with the Authority, but were betrayed.

name: The Hive
description: A faction that operates within massive trees called Greathives. They are ruled by a Greatlord and use an attunement called Lifeweave to transfer life energy, create organic technology, and power devices. They are extremely closed off and hostile to outsiders who learn about Lifeweave.
